narrative:
Cincinnati 8-C (precinct in Hamilton County) has 1,508 registered voters, with 54.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.4%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.6 percentage points.
